overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing exploration of Kresilas's Residence in Kythera at night. The player character walks along a torch-lit terrace overlooking the sea, through a garden with classical Greek pergolas, and explores the residence courtyard with large decorative urns before approaching an NPC guard.

scene_state.functional_zone: torch-lit terrace overlooking the Mediterranean sea

events.description: entering covered stone pergola from open terrace

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace wall with the sea visible to the right, approaching the covered walkway

entered.detail: ancient stone tower with crenellations overlooking the sea
dark blue Mediterranean sea visible in the distance under night sky
low stone wall lining the terrace walkway
burning fire pit providing warm orange light against the blue night
covered walkway with wooden beams and stone columns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a torch-lit terrace overlooking the dark Mediterranean sea, with an ancient stone watch tower visible in the distance. The camera moves forward along the terrace wall, passing cypress trees and burning fire pits, before entering a covered stone pergola with wooden beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden path leading to ancient Greek residence

events.description: exiting covered pergola into open garden area with grass and stone path
historical location Kresilas's Residence discovered, UI notification appears

agents.ego_description: walking down stone path through grassy garden toward the residence buildings in the distance

entered.detail: dry Mediterranean grass surrounding the stone path
irregular stone paving stones forming a walkway through the garden
ancient Greek residence with stone walls and terracotta tiled roof

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered pergola, the scene opens into a garden with dry grass and a stone path leading toward Kresilas's Residence. The sea and watch tower disappear from view as the camera advances. At 22 seconds, a UI notification marks the discovery of the historical location.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior perimeter of Kresilas's Residence with wooden fences

events.description: turning right to circle around the residence building exterior

agents.ego_description: circling around the residence exterior examining the architecture and looking for entrance

entered.detail: wooden picket fence surrounding the residence property
tall stone wall enclosing the inner courtyard

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the residence exterior along a cobblestone path, passing wooden fences and stone walls. The building details become clearer as the camera approaches, revealing wooden porches and lit windows. The garden gives way to the built structure as the player explores the perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with large decorative urns and columned pergola

events.description: approaching NPC guard holding a torch near the residence entrance

agents.ego_description: exploring the courtyard with large urns and approaching the guard near the doorway

notable_agents.action: standing guard holding a lit torch near the doorway, wearing armor

entered.detail: massive ceramic urns with red decorative patterns and cracked surfaces
wooden pergola with stone columns and climbing vines providing partial cover
stone tile flooring with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: Entering the inner courtyard, the camera moves under a columned pergola past massive decorative urns with red patterns. The ground features mosaic stone tiling. Toward the end of the segment, an NPC guard holding a torch becomes visible near a doorway, standing watch as the camera approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a torch-lit seaside terrace into the intimate, structured confines of a classical Greek residence. It begins by gliding along a terrace wall overlooking the dark Mediterranean sea and a distant watch tower, passing burning fire pits before slipping under the wooden beams of a stone pergola. As the camera exits the cover, the vista of the sea vanishes, replaced by a garden of dry grass and a stone path that leads toward the residence. The scene then shifts from the open greenery to the built environment, circling the exterior cobblestone paths and wooden fences before the camera enters the inner courtyard. Finally, the movement flows under a columned pergola past massive red-patterned urns and mosaic tiling, coming to a halt as a torch-bearing guard appears near a doorway.
